summary: Advocacy Mode and Decision Engine event_follow_up feature testing complete. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend Playwright UI tests passed. Verified: Decision Engine event_follow_up detection, Advocacy Home page with groupings and tabs, Recommendation Builder with full create/send flow, Recommendation Detail with response tracking actions, Relationship Detail with school memory, Navigation between Advocacy pages, and Mission Control now shows event_follow_up interventions in Priority Alerts.
test_credentials: No auth required - mock data backend
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded recommendations from advocacy_engine.py: rec_1 (warm_response), rec_2 (awaiting_reply, stale), rec_3 (sent), rec_4 (draft), rec_5 (closed). Created additional test recommendations during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advocacy Mode testing complete. All 4 Advocacy screens verified: (1) Advocacy Home (/advocacy) - 4 groupings (Needs Attention, Drafts, Recently Sent, Closed), 6 tabs (All, Drafts, Sent, Awaiting, Responded, Closed) with counts, New Recommendation button, rec cards with status badges and navigation. (2) Recommendation Builder (/advocacy/new) - athlete dropdown, school dropdown, 6 fit reason chips, fit note textarea, supporting context section (auto-populated from events), coach name input, intro message textarea, 5 next step radio buttons, Save Draft and Send Recommendation buttons, full flow creates recommendation and redirects. (3) Recommendation Detail (/advocacy/:id) - summary section, response tracking with status progression dots, Log Response/Follow-up/Close buttons with forms, response history timeline, relationship summary section. (4) Relationship Detail (/advocacy/relationships/:schoolId) - school name with division, warmth badge, 4 stat boxes (Interactions/Athletes Introduced/Response Rate/Last Contact), athletes introduced list with status, interaction timeline with event notes and recommendation events. Decision Engine event_follow_up category now detected and surfaced in Mission Control Priority Alerts (verified Hot stale notes >48h trigger). Navigation works between Mission Control, Events, and Advocacy via header tabs.
mocked_api_note: All athlete/event/recommendation data is MOCKED (mock_data.py, advocacy_engine.py)

decision_engine_event_follow_up: event_follow_up interventions detected for stale notes
event_follow_up has required fields (category, trigger, score, urgency, impact, etc.)
advocacy_recommendations_list: Response has 4 groups (needs_attention, drafts, recently_sent, closed)
Stats structure correct (total, drafts, sent, awaiting, warm, closed)
advocacy_recommendation_detail: GET /api/advocacy/recommendations/rec_1 returns warm_response rec with relationship_summary
advocacy_recommendation_create: Created rec has status=draft and id starting with rec_
advocacy_relationships: GET /api/advocacy/relationships returns list of school relationships
mission_control: Priority alerts may include event_follow_up category

advocacy_home: New Recommendation button present and navigates to /advocacy/new
All 6 tabs visible with counts (All, Drafts, Sent, Awaiting, Responded, Closed)
4 sections render (Needs Attention, Drafts, Recently Sent, Closed)
rec_1 card shows Marcus Johnson → Michigan with Warm Response badge
Card click navigates to detail page
recommendation_builder: 6 fit reason chips (athletic_ability, tactical_awareness, academic_fit, character_leadership, coachability, program_need_match)
Coach name input and Intro message textarea present
Save Draft and Send Recommendation buttons present
Full flow works: select athlete → school → fit reasons → intro → next step → Send → redirect to /advocacy
recommendation_detail: Status badge shows correct status (Warm Response for rec_1, Draft for rec_4)
Recommendation summary section with athlete/school/coach/date/fit reasons/intro
Response tracking section with status progression dots (Sent → Awaiting → Warm Response → Closed)
Action buttons: Log Response, Follow-up, Close
Log Response form opens with note input and warm/declined radio
Follow-up button increments count (history entry added)
Close form opens with reason selection
Relationship summary section shows school stats
Draft rec (rec_4) has Send button and no response tracking section
relationship_detail: Stats: 3 Interactions, 2 Athletes Introduced, 50% Response Rate, Last Contact today
Athletes Introduced section with Marcus Johnson and Olivia Anderson
Interaction Timeline with 5 entries (event notes + recommendation events)
navigation: Advocacy tab visible in header and underlined when on /advocacy
Back buttons work on all Advocacy pages
mission_control_event_follow_up: event_follow_up interventions shown in Priority Alerts
Marcus Johnson: Michigan showed hot interest at Winter Showcase — follow-up overdue
Olivia Anderson: Stanford showed hot interest at Winter Showcase — follow-up overdue

advocacy_mode_verification.relationship_detail_athletes_list: VERIFIED - shows athletes with rec status
